title: DocumentCategoryDocumentType - Metadata API
description: Represents the junction between a DocumentCategory and a DocumentType. Puts a DocumentType in a DocumentCategory.

documentCategory.description: The master label of the related DocumentCategory.

documentType.description: The master label of the related DocumentType.

isProtected.description: An auto-generated value that doesn’t impact the behavior of the metadata type. The default value is false.

masterLabel.description: The master label of the DocumentCategoryDocumentType. This internal label doesn’t get translated.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="DocumentCategoryDocumentType">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="documentCategory" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="documentType" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="isProtected" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="masterLabel" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
```
